payload.answer: The input contains an open loop due to unresolved relative time references.
citations: Sam said last Friday that he is leaving Goldman next month.

open_loops.description: The timing is ambiguous because 'last Friday' and 'next month' are relative references without an anchor date, so the actual date Sam said this and the month he is leaving Goldman cannot be determined from the input alone.
open_loops.evidence: Sam said last Friday that he is leaving Goldman next month.
